chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1626 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) 1. For orders on M.A. No.8920/2025. 2. For orders on M.A. No.8921/2025. 02.12.2025 Mr. Ali Asghar Mangi, Advocate for petitioners. == 1. Urgency application is granted. 2. Learned counsel for the petitioners, under the instructions, does not press this petition. Accordingly, present petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
